feature_formulas.features.bet_size_bb: Available/source bet size in BB. In live, derived from to_call or raise buttons; in train, mapped from features.bet_size_bb.
feature_formulas.features.call_max_bb: Maximum profitable call in big blinds. In live = call_max / big_blind.
feature_formulas.features.effective_stack_bb: min(hero_stack, max(active_villain_stacks)) / big_blind; folded players excluded.
feature_formulas.features.equity_win: Single model equity against active opponents; in live = DecisionInput.equity.
feature_formulas.features.equity_win_present: Conservative win equity adjusted to players present at the table; equals equity_win when present count is unknown or equal to active count.
feature_formulas.features.ev_certain_bb: Net equity value in BB on the guaranteed pot: equity_win * pot_certain_bb - to_call_bb.
feature_formulas.features.ev_probable_bb: Net equity value in BB on the probable pot: equity_win * pot_probable_bb - to_call_bb.
feature_formulas.features.players_active: current players still in pot, hero included; live = active_opponents + 1 (fallback).
feature_formulas.features.pot_certain_bb: Guaranteed pot in BB if hero continues now: current pot_bb + to_call_bb.
feature_formulas.features.pot_probable_bb: Probable pot in BB if hero continues and remaining active players match the same minimum contribution; actors are internal only, not model inputs.
feature_formulas.features.pot_probable_margin_bb: pot_probable_bb - to_call_bb; probable reward remaining after the amount hero must add.
feature_formulas.features.to_call_bb: to_call / big_blind; 0.0 for a free check.
